resources.string: Street maps use OpenFreeMap vector tiles (OpenStreetMap data). Optional satellite imagery uses Esri World Imagery raster tiles. Dark style switches the vector theme. No API keys required.
© OpenStreetMap contributors. Map data is available under the Open Database License (ODbL).
© OpenFreeMap © OpenMapTiles © OpenStreetMap contributors. Vector map tiles and styles served from tiles.openfreemap.org.
© Esri, Maxar, Earthstar Geographics, and the GIS User Community. Satellite imagery is provided via Esri\'s public World Imagery tile service for normal application use.
Calorie estimates are approximate and not medical advice.
Sex, age, and height are used to estimate calories burned during runs.
